title: Internal error on using constant variable within array assignment

features.name: string localparam as key in associative array literal within class constructor
features.description: Code should include using a localparam string variable as a key in an associative array constructor literal inside a class constructor call

features.name: string-keyed associative array typedef
features.description: Code should include a typedef for a string-keyed associative array of integers

features.name: string localparam used in associative array literal key
features.description: Code should include a string localparam variable used as a key in an associative array constructor literal
